escalation.rationale: Russia deployed Oreshnik hypersonic missile against Kyiv in massive bombardment while US conducted new self-defense strikes on Iranian targets amid fragile ceasefire.

ticker_items: Russia fires Oreshnik hypersonic missile in major Kyiv bombardment
US strikes Iranian missile sites amid ceasefire negotiations
Iran-US peace deal progress announced by Trump
Five NATO countries reject mandatory Ukraine funding plan
Xi Jinping planning visit to North Korea per reports

eastern_europe.description: Russia fired Oreshnik hypersonic missile and hundreds of drones in massive bombardment of capital

middle_east.description: US military conducted self-defense strikes targeting Iranian missile launch sites and boats

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths

middle_east.text: The United States will either have a good agreement with Iran or deal with the country another way
middle_east.speaker: Marco Rubio
middle_east.title: US Secretary of State

middle_east.text: Iran deal isn't even fully negotiated yet, I won't make bad deals
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Xi Jinping reportedly planning visit to North Korea to revive US denuclearization talks. Reports indicate China secretly trained Russian troops who later fought in Ukraine, despite maintaining appearance of impartiality.
British sailors on standby aboard RFA Lyme Bay for mine-clearing mission in Strait of Hormuz. UK and France leading potential international mine-clearing effort awaiting Iran peace agreement.
Deployed 8,000 troops, fighter squadron, and Chinese air defense system to Saudi Arabia under mutual defense treaty. Deployments began in April enhancing Pakistani military presence in the region.

financial.notes: Sweden's analysis shows Russian economy actually contracted 8% between 2020-2024 despite claimed 13% growth.

update_log.text: US conducts self-defense strikes on Iranian missile sites amid ceasefire negotiations
Russia fires Oreshnik hypersonic missile in massive bombardment of Kyiv killing 4 and injuring 100
Trump announces potential Iran peace deal progress signaling Strait of Hormuz could reopen soon
Five NATO countries reject proposal for mandatory 0.25% GDP spending on Ukraine military aid
